2606.29907.title: CW-B: Class Weighted Boosting Framework for Imbalance Resilient Multi Class Cardiac Phenotyping
2606.29907.paper_summary: Cardiac discharge phenotyping informs post-discharge treatment and follow-up, but real-world records are often incomplete and class-imbalanced, increasing the risk of missed high-risk phenotypes. We propose CW-B, a clinical risk-aligned class-weighted XGBoost pipeline for five-class cardiac discharge phenotyping under real-world class imbalance and missingness. CW-B combines fold-specific class-balanced instance weighting, missingness-indicator augmentation, and classwise error auditing to improve recognition of clinically prioritized phenotypes while preserving interpretable and auditable decision logic. In five-fold stratified cross-validation, CW-B achieves the best Accuracy, Macro-F1, Balanced Accuracy, and Prioritized F1 among tree-based, ensemble, and neural baselines. Overall, CW-B provides a practical and deployment-oriented approach for more reliable cardiac discharge phenotyping in real-world clinical settings.
2606.29907.paper_summary_zh: 心臟出院表型化有助於出院後的治療和隨訪，但現實世界的記錄往往不完整且類別不平衡，增加了錯過高風險表型的風險。我們提出CW-B，一個臨床風險對齊的類別加權XGBoost管道，用於在現實世界類別不平衡和缺失的情況下進行五類心臟出院表型化。CW-B結合了特定摺疊的類別平衡實例加權、缺失指示增強和類別錯誤審核，以提高臨床優先表型的識別，同時保留可解釋和可審核的決策邏輯。在五摺層次交叉驗證中，CW-B在基於樹的、集成的和神經基準中實現了最佳的準確率、宏觀F1、平衡準確率和優先F1。總體而言，CW-B為在現實世界臨床環境中提供更可靠的心臟出院表型化提供了一種實用和以部署為導向的方法。
2606.29907.author: Sijia Li et.al.
2606.29907.authors: Sijia Li, Xiaoyu Tan, Chen Zhan, Yuanji Ma, Haoyu Wang, Xihe Qiu
